description: Tasks template for modernization plan. Generate this file alongside plan.md to track individual migration tasks.

tasks.description: Deploy the Photo Album application to Azure Container Apps
tasks.reason: The user wants to deploy the application to Azure Container Apps for a fully managed, serverless container hosting experience.
tasks.requirements: Deploy the existing containerized Spring Boot application to Azure Container Apps. Provision required Azure infrastructure and deploy using Azure CLI. The application already has a Dockerfile.
